BAGL
Sensory neuron (O2, CO2, social signals, touch)
Conns in: RIBR: 1

Conns in: RIBL: 1

RIML
Layer 1 interneuron; motorneuron in White et al., 1986

Conns in: AVL: 1, RIS: 1, SMDDL: 1, SMDDR: 1
